# Media fixture attribution

Downloaded for ebbackup integration tests. Refresh with:
`engine_cpp/tests/fixtures/scripts/fetch_media_fixtures.ps1` (add `-UseMirror` for jsDelivr-first)

Sources:

- `binaries/sample.exe`: Microsoft Sysinternals Sigcheck (test binary; https://learn.microsoft.com/sysinternals)
- `images/demo.webp`: Google WebP gallery / webmproject examples
- `images/demo_alt.webp`: Google WebP gallery / webmproject examples (incremental swap)
- `images/earth.jpg`: Pillow test image (HPND, test use)
- `nested/l0/l1/l2/badge.gif`: Pillow test image (HPND, test use)
- `video/sample.mp4`: MDN learning-area sample (CC0)
- `nested/l0/l1/l2/clip.mp4`: copy of video/sample.mp4 (same bytes)
- `archives/sample.zip`: generated locally (Compress-Archive)
- `nested/l0/l1/payload.tar.gz`: generated locally (tar -czf)

Generated: 2026-07-06
